languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

languages.text: "Появление второго Вольного Торговца серьезно пошатнуло иерархическую структуру на борту корабля. Требуется пересмотр субординации. Не уверен, что подходящий прецедент найдется в летописях достаточно быстро".

"The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."
languages.original_text: "Появление второго Вольного Торговца серьезно пошатнуло иерархическую структуру на борту корабля. Требуется пересмотр субординации. Не уверен, что подходящий прецедент найдется в летописях достаточно быстро".

"The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

"The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

languages.text: 「もう一人のローグトレーダーの出現は、船内の階層構造を大きく揺るがしました。指揮命令系統の見直しが必要です。このような事例が、しばらくの間は記録に残ることはないでしょう」
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: 「もう一人のローグトレーダーの出現は、船内の階層構造を大きく揺るがしました。指揮命令系統の見直しが必要です。このような事例が、しばらくの間は記録に残ることはないでしょう。」

languages.text: « L'apparition d'un deuxième libre-marchand a considérablement ébranlé la structure hiérarchique à bord. Dans ces circonstances, un examen de la chaîne de commandement est indispensable. Je ne suis pas sûr que nous puissions trouver un précédent dans les annales. »
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: « L'apparition d'un deuxième libre-marchand a considérablement ébranlé la structure hiérarchique à bord. Dans ces circonstances, un examen de la chaîne de commandement est indispensable. Je ne suis pas sûr que nous puissions trouver un précédent dans les annales. »

languages.text: "Die Ankunft eines zweiten Freihändlers hat die hierarchische Struktur an Bord erschüttert. Wir müssen die Befehlskette neu bewerten. Ich bin nicht sicher, ob sich auf die Schnelle ein Präzedenzfall in den Annalen finden lässt.
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: "Die Ankunft eines zweiten Freihändlers hat die hierarchische Struktur an Bord erschüttert. Wir müssen die Befehlskette neu bewerten. Ich bin nicht sicher, ob sich auf die Schnelle ein Präzedenzfall in den Annalen finden lässt.

languages.text: "İkinci bir Hür Tacir'in ortaya çıkışı, gemideki hiyerarşik yapıyı ciddi şekilde sarstı. Emir komuta zincirinin gözden geçirilmesi gerekiyor. Yıllıklarda buna uygun bir emsalin yakın zamanda bulunacağından emin değilim."
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: "İkinci bir Hür Tacir'in ortaya çıkışı, gemideki hiyerarşik yapıyı ciddi şekilde sarstı. Emir komuta zincirinin gözden geçirilmesi gerekiyor. Yıllıklarda buna uygun bir emsalin yakın zamanda bulunacağından emin değilim."

languages.text: «La aparición de un segundo Comerciante Independiente ha causado una gran conmoción en la jerarquía de la nave. Es preciso revisar la cadena de mando. No me consta que existan precedentes en los anales de la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: «La aparición de un segundo Comerciante Independiente ha causado una gran conmoción en la jerarquía de la nave. Es preciso revisar la cadena de mando. No me consta que existan precedentes en los anales de la dinastía».

languages.text: “第二位行商浪人的出现，已经严重动摇了船上的等级秩序。我们必须重新审视指挥链。恐怕近期在史册中都难以找到类似的先例。”
languages.original_text: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."

traits.locale_text: “第二位行商浪人的出现，已经严重动摇了船上的等级秩序。我们必须重新审视指挥链。恐怕近期在史册中都难以找到类似的先例。”
